steps.title: Define intermittent evidence
steps.content: If wastewater influxes happened intermittently, delta 15-N values at the intermediate-tourism sites should rise and fall over time rather than stay consistently elevated. The supporting data must show fluctuation at Akumal Bay and Tulum.

steps.title: Reject weak descriptions
steps.content: A misstates the February 2017 comparison with Xahuayxol. B focuses on missing data and extreme values rather than the pattern over time. C describes relative stability, which points away from intermittent influxes.

steps.title: Use the fluctuating values
steps.content: Akumal Bay and Tulum both fluctuate considerably across the measured dates, showing a rising-and-falling pattern consistent with wastewater that comes and goes. The answer is D.
